surface_reason: Real section_07c storyboard_html_emitter renders a single-variant review page (_slide_block has no A-vs-B slot) and cannot represent A/B-per-card selection; purpose-built deterministic A/B HTML used instead. Publish push mirrors the real storyboard_publisher/generate-storyboard cmd_publish steps via the same git primitives (_git_auth_env/_github_pages_base_url/_run_git_command in gamma_operations).
deploy_caveat: GitHub Pages may take ~1 minute to deploy after push.
